creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:

User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10.8;
	rv:17.0) Gecko/20130107 Thunderbird/17.0.2

Oops, looks like I should have also removed the

DEPRECATION
and

EXPIRATION_DATE

lines from the Makefile.

Sorry about that.
